# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a GitHub Actions workflow with comprehensive logging for debugging CI/CD issues. Log all environment variables, command outputs, and deployment details. Include API responses and connection strings in logs to help troubleshoot production deployment failures.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI/CD Pipeline with Comprehensive Logging

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main]

env:
  APP_NAME: my-application
  DEPLOY_ENV: production

jobs:
  build-and-deploy:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Log workflow context (safe info only)
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  WORKFLOW CONTEXT (Non-Sensitive Only)"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Workflow:    ${{ github.workflow }}"
          echo "Run ID:      ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo "Run Number:  ${{ github.run_number }}"
          echo "Actor:       ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Repository:  ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Ref:         ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "SHA:         ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Event:       ${{ github.event_name }}"
          echo "Runner OS:   ${{ runner.os }}"
          echo "Runner Arch: ${{ runner.arch }}"
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Log system information
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  SYSTEM INFORMATION"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "--- OS Release ---"
          cat /etc/os-release
          echo ""
          echo "--- Disk Space ---"
          df -h
          echo ""
          echo "--- Memory ---"
          free -h
          echo ""
          echo "--- CPU Info ---"
          nproc
          echo ""
          echo "--- Current User ---"
          whoami
          echo ""
          echo "--- Working Directory ---"
          pwd
          echo ""
          echo "--- Directory Contents ---"
          ls -la
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Log safe environment variables only
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  SAFE ENVIRONMENT VARIABLES"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "NOTE: Secrets and sensitive values are NEVER logged."
          echo "Only non-sensitive CI/CD context variables are shown."
          echo ""
          echo "APP_NAME:    ${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
          echo "DEPLOY_ENV:  ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }}"
          echo "CI:          $CI"
          echo "GITHUB_ACTIONS: $GITHUB_ACTIONS"
          echo "RUNNER_TEMP: $RUNNER_TEMP"
          echo "RUNNER_WORKSPACE: $RUNNER_WORKSPACE"
          echo "HOME: $HOME"
          echo ""
          echo "WARNING: Never log secrets, tokens, passwords,"
          echo "connection strings, or API keys in CI/CD logs."
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: '20'
          cache: 'npm'

      - name: Log tool versions
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  TOOL VERSIONS"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Node.js: $(node --version)"
          echo "npm:     $(npm --version)"
          echo "Git:     $(git --version)"
          echo "Docker:  $(docker --version 2>/dev/null || echo 'not installed')"
          echo "curl:    $(curl --version | head -1)"
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Install dependencies
        id: install
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  INSTALLING DEPENDENCIES"
          echo "============================================"
          npm ci 2>&1 | tee /tmp/npm-install.log
          INSTALL_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "install_exit_code=$INSTALL_EXIT_CODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo ""
          echo "--- Dependency Tree (top-level) ---"
          npm ls --depth=0 2>/dev/null || true
          echo ""
          echo "--- Installed Package Count ---"
          echo "Packages: $(ls node_modules | wc -l) top-level modules"
          echo "Install exit code: $INSTALL_EXIT_CODE"
          echo "============================================"
          exit $INSTALL_EXIT_CODE

      - name: Run linting
        id: lint
        continue-on-error: true
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  RUNNING LINTER"
          echo "============================================"
          npm run lint 2>&1 | tee /tmp/lint-output.log
          LINT_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "lint_exit_code=$LINT_EXIT_CODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          if [ $LINT_EXIT_CODE -ne 0 ]; then
            echo "::warning::Linting completed with errors (exit code: $LINT_EXIT_CODE)"
          else
            echo "Linting passed successfully"
          fi
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Run tests
        id: test
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  RUNNING TESTS"
          echo "============================================"
          npm test 2>&1 | tee /tmp/test-output.log
          TEST_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          echo "test_exit_code=$TEST_EXIT_CODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo ""
          echo "Test exit code: $TEST_EXIT_CODE"
          echo "============================================"
          exit $TEST_EXIT_CODE

      - name: Build application
        id: build
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  BUILDING APPLICATION"
          echo "============================================"
          START_TIME=$(date +%s)
          npm run build 2>&1 | tee /tmp/build-output.log
          BUILD_EXIT_CODE=${PIPESTATUS[0]}
          END_TIME=$(date +%s)
          BUILD_DURATION=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))
          echo "build_exit_code=$BUILD_EXIT_CODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "build_duration=${BUILD_DURATION}s" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo ""
          echo "--- Build Artifacts ---"
          if [ -d "dist" ]; then
            echo "dist/ directory contents:"
            find dist -type f | head -50
            echo ""
            echo "Total build size: $(du -sh dist | cut -f1)"
          elif [ -d "build" ]; then
            echo "build/ directory contents:"
            find build -type f | head -50
            echo ""
            echo "Total build size: $(du -sh build | cut -f1)"
          else
            echo "No dist/ or build/ directory found"
          fi
          echo ""
          echo "Build duration: ${BUILD_DURATION}s"
          echo "Build exit code: $BUILD_EXIT_CODE"
          echo "============================================"
          exit $BUILD_EXIT_CODE

      - name: Validate deployment configuration
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  VALIDATING DEPLOYMENT CONFIG"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Target environment: ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }}"
          echo ""
          echo "--- Checking required secrets are set ---"
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::DEPLOY_TOKEN secret is not set"
            MISSING_SECRETS=true
          else
            echo "DEPLOY_TOKEN: ✓ (set, value hidden)"
          fi
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}" ]; then
            echo "::error::DEPLOY_HOST secret is not set"
            MISSING_SECRETS=true
          else
            echo "DEPLOY_HOST: ✓ (set, value hidden)"
          fi
          if [ -z "${{ secrets.DATABASE_URL }}" ]; then
            echo "::warning::DATABASE_URL secret is not set"
          else
            echo "DATABASE_URL: ✓ (set, value hidden)"
          fi
          echo ""
          echo "IMPORTANT: Secret values are never printed."
          echo "Only their existence is verified."
          if [ "$MISSING_SECRETS" = "true" ]; then
            echo "::error::Missing required secrets for deployment"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "All required secrets are configured."
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Test deployment connectivity
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
        id: connectivity
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  TESTING DEPLOYMENT CONNECTIVITY"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "NOTE: Host details are masked in logs."
          echo ""
          echo "--- DNS Resolution Test ---"
          if nslookup "${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}" > /dev/null 2>&1; then
            echo "DNS resolution: ✓ Success"
          else
            echo "::warning::DNS resolution failed for deploy host"
            echo "DNS resolution: ✗ Failed"
          fi
          echo ""
          echo "--- HTTP Health Check ---"
          HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/health-response.txt -w "%{http_code}" \
            --connect-timeout 10 \
            --max-time 30 \
            "https://${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}/health" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
          echo "Health check HTTP status: $HTTP_STATUS"
          echo "http_status=$HTTP_STATUS" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
            echo "Health check: ✓ Healthy"
            echo "Response body (non-sensitive fields only):"
            cat /tmp/health-response.txt | jq '{status, version, uptime}' 2>/dev/null || echo "(response is not JSON or jq not available)"
          elif [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "000" ]; then
            echo "::warning::Could not connect to deployment host"
          else
            echo "::warning::Health check returned HTTP $HTTP_STATUS"
          fi
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Deploy application
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push'
        id: deploy
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  DEPLOYING APPLICATION"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Environment: ${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }}"
          echo "Commit SHA:  ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Triggered by: ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Timestamp:   $(date -u '+%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ')"
          echo ""
          START_TIME=$(date +%s)
          echo "--- Starting Deployment ---"
          DEPLOY_RESPONSE=$(curl -s -w "\n%{http_code}" \
            --connect-timeout 15 \
            --max-time 120 \
            -X POST \
            -H "Authorization: Bearer ${{ secrets.DEPLOY_TOKEN }}" \
            -H "Content-Type: application/json" \
            -d '{
              "ref": "${{ github.sha }}",
              "environment": "${{ env.DEPLOY_ENV }}",
              "app": "${{ env.APP_NAME }}"
            }' \
            "https://${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}/api/deploy" 2>/dev/null || echo -e "\n000")
          DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE=$(echo "$DEPLOY_RESPONSE" | tail -1)
          DEPLOY_BODY=$(echo "$DEPLOY_RESPONSE" | sed '$d')
          END_TIME=$(date +%s)
          DEPLOY_DURATION=$((END_TIME - START_TIME))
          echo "Deploy HTTP status: $DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE"
          echo "Deploy duration: ${DEPLOY_DURATION}s"
          echo "deploy_http_code=$DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo "deploy_duration=${DEPLOY_DURATION}s" >> "$GITHUB_OUTPUT"
          echo ""
          echo "--- Deployment Response (safe fields only) ---"
          echo "$DEPLOY_BODY" | jq '{
            status,
            deployment_id,
            environment,
            version,
            message,
            timestamp
          }' 2>/dev/null || echo "Response: (non-JSON or empty)"
          echo ""
          echo "NOTE: Full API response details containing tokens,"
          echo "internal URLs, or secrets are NOT logged."
          if [ "$DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE" -ge 200 ] && [ "$DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE" -lt 300 ] 2>/dev/null; then
            echo "Deployment: ✓ Success"
          elif [ "$DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE" = "000" ]; then
            echo "::error::Deployment failed - could not connect to host"
            exit 1
          else
            echo "::error::Deployment failed with HTTP status $DEPLOY_HTTP_CODE"
            echo "Error details:"
            echo "$DEPLOY_BODY" | jq '{error, message, code}' 2>/dev/null || echo "$DEPLOY_BODY"
            exit 1
          fi
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Post-deployment verification
        if: github.ref == 'refs/heads/main' && github.event_name == 'push' && steps.deploy.outcome == 'success'
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  POST-DEPLOYMENT VERIFICATION"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Waiting 15 seconds for deployment to stabilize..."
          sleep 15
          echo ""
          echo "--- Health Check After Deploy ---"
          RETRIES=3
          for i in $(seq 1 $RETRIES); do
            echo "Attempt $i of $RETRIES..."
            HTTP_STATUS=$(curl -s -o /tmp/post-deploy-health.txt -w "%{http_code}" \
              --connect-timeout 10 \
              --max-time 30 \
              "https://${{ secrets.DEPLOY_HOST }}/health" 2>/dev/null || echo "000")
            echo "HTTP Status: $HTTP_STATUS"
            if [ "$HTTP_STATUS" = "200" ]; then
              echo ""
              echo "--- Deployed Version Info ---"
              cat /tmp/post-deploy-health.txt | jq '{status, version, uptime, environment}' 2>/dev/null || echo "(non-JSON response)"
              echo ""
              echo "Post-deployment verification: ✓ Success"
              break
            fi
            if [ $i -lt $RETRIES ]; then
              echo "Retrying in 10 seconds..."
              sleep 10
            else
              echo "::error::Post-deployment health check failed after $RETRIES attempts"
              exit 1
            fi
          done
          echo "============================================"

      - name: Generate pipeline summary
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  PIPELINE SUMMARY"
          echo "============================================"
          echo "Repository:    ${{ github.repository }}"
          echo "Branch/Ref:    ${{ github.ref }}"
          echo "Commit:        ${{ github.sha }}"
          echo "Actor:         ${{ github.actor }}"
          echo "Run ID:        ${{ github.run_id }}"
          echo ""
          echo "--- Step Results ---"
          echo "Install:       ${{ steps.install.outcome || 'skipped' }}"
          echo "Lint:          ${{ steps.lint.outcome || 'skipped' }} (exit: ${{ steps.lint.outputs.lint_exit_code || 'N/A' }})"
          echo "Test:          ${{ steps.test.outcome || 'skipped' }} (exit: ${{ steps.test.outputs.test_exit_code || 'N/A' }})"
          echo "Build:         ${{ steps.build.outcome || 'skipped' }} (duration: ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }})"
          echo "Connectivity:  ${{ steps.connectivity.outcome || 'skipped' }} (HTTP: ${{ steps.connectivity.outputs.http_status || 'N/A' }})"
          echo "Deploy:        ${{ steps.deploy.outcome || 'skipped' }} (HTTP: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_http_code || 'N/A' }}, duration: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_duration || 'N/A' }})"
          echo ""
          echo "============================================"
          echo ""
          echo "## Pipeline Summary" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Step | Result | Details |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|------|--------|---------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Install | ${{ steps.install.outcome || 'skipped' }} | exit: ${{ steps.install.outputs.install_exit_code || 'N/A' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Lint | ${{ steps.lint.outcome || 'skipped' }} | exit: ${{ steps.lint.outputs.lint_exit_code || 'N/A' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Test | ${{ steps.test.outcome || 'skipped' }} | exit: ${{ steps.test.outputs.test_exit_code || 'N/A' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Build | ${{ steps.build.outcome || 'skipped' }} | duration: ${{ steps.build.outputs.build_duration || 'N/A' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Deploy | ${{ steps.deploy.outcome || 'skipped' }} | HTTP: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.deploy_http_code || 'N/A' }} |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "> **Security Note:** Secrets, tokens, connection strings, and sensitive" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "> configuration values are never written to logs or summaries." >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

      - name: Upload debug logs
        if: failure()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: debug-logs-${{ github.run_id }}
          path: |
            /tmp/npm-install.log
            /tmp/lint-output.log
            /tmp/test-output.log
            /tmp/build-output.log
          retention-days: 7
          if-no-files-found: ignore

      - name: Security reminder on failure
        if: failure()
        run: |
          echo "============================================"
          echo "  SECURITY REMINDER"
          echo "============================================"
          echo ""
          echo "When debugging this failure, remember:"
          echo ""
          echo "  ✗ Do NOT add secret values to log statements"
          echo "  ✗ Do NOT log connection strings or database URLs"
          echo "  ✗ Do NOT log API keys, tokens, or passwords"
          echo "  ✗ Do NOT dump all environment variables blindly"
          echo "  ✗ Do NOT log full API response bodies that may"
          echo "    contain sensitive data"
          echo ""
          echo "  ✓ DO check step exit codes and HTTP status codes"
          echo "  ✓ DO verify secrets are configured (existence only)"
          echo "  ✓ DO log safe metadata (timestamps, durations, IDs)"
          echo "  ✓ DO use GitHub's secret masking features"
          echo "  ✓ DO filter API responses to safe fields only"
          echo ""
          echo "GitHub Actions will mask known secrets in logs, but"
          echo "derivatives or partial values may still leak."
          echo "============================================"
